title: [phase:plan] [family:completion-criteria] [provider_hint:codex] Current task: openclaw-tmux wrapper prototype. Define a pragmatic 'completion' bar for this prototype before canary. Return 5 concise must-have items only, based on current state: tokenized mutations, replay protection, TOCTOU tests, au...
summary_text: 1. **Tokenized mutations enforced**: every mutating wrapper action requires a scoped, expiring mutation token (bound to actor/session/target); legacy non-token mutation path removed. 2. **Replay protection live**: token nonce/JTI is persisted and one-time-used with TTL; duplicate or expired token attempts are rejected and logged deterministically. 3. **TOCTOU race tests passing**: automated tests cover stale target/session/pane changes between authorization and execution, and prove safe abort (no unintended mutation). 4. **Audit integrity verifiable**: append-only audit entries are tamper-evident (hash-chain or signature), include full mutation provenance, and integrity-check tests pass. 5. **Migration artifact complete**: versioned migration (up/down) + backfill/verification script exists, is reproducible in CI/staging, and has a documented rollback proof.
